original_image_tags: The reverse side of a document page, showing significant "bleed-through" or "show-through" from text typed on the opposite side. The text is mirrored and largely illegible. The page has two punch holes at the top center. The bottom of the page contains two blue ink stamps.

elements.description: Two stamped text areas at the bottom right corner, oriented upside down. One reads 'RECEIVED FBI COMMUNICATIONS JAN 13 4 15 PM '55'. The other reads 'REC'D BELMONT FBI - JUSTICE JAN 13 4 51 PM '55'.

judge.reason: Description A claims two blue ink stamps with illegible text, while Description B quotes specific, readable text from two stamps, indicating a direct contradiction on the content's legibility and detail.
